seo.description: Arta Tejarat International Apadana is a Tehran-based international trading company specializing in import, export, sourcing and trade facilitation. Building reliable global commerce for B2B partners.

hero.title: Connecting Iranian enterprise to global markets
hero.subtitle: Arta Tejarat International Apadana is an international trading house built on reliability, transparency and execution — moving goods and value across borders for businesses that expect more.

intro.title: A trading partner engineered for trust
intro.body: We exist to make international trade simpler, safer and more profitable for our partners. From sourcing the right supplier to clearing the final shipment, Arta Tejarat manages the full commercial journey with the discipline of a global enterprise and the agility of a dedicated team.

highlights.text: Sourcing, negotiation, logistics and documentation handled under one accountable roof.

highlights.title: Borderless network
highlights.text: Trusted suppliers, manufacturers and partners across multiple continents.

highlights.title: Commercial integrity
highlights.text: Transparent terms and rigorous compliance on every transaction.

services.subtitle: A complete commercial capability — from first inquiry to final delivery.

seo.title: About Arta Tejarat — International Trading House in Tehran, Iran
seo.description: Learn about Arta Tejarat International Apadana: our story, mission, vision and values as an international import, export and trade facilitation company based in Tehran.
seo.keywords: About Arta Tejarat, international trade company Iran, import export Tehran, global trade partner

hero.title: An international trading house with a clear purpose
hero.subtitle: Arta Tejarat International Apadana was founded to bridge Iranian enterprise with global markets — combining commercial expertise, an international network and uncompromising integrity.

story.title: Built to make global trade dependable
paragraphs: Arta Tejarat International Apadana operates at the intersection of opportunity and execution. We were established to give businesses a trade partner they can trust completely — one that understands the realities of international commerce and delivers results without surprises.

From our base in Tehran, we coordinate import, export and sourcing operations that connect local enterprise with suppliers and buyers around the world. Every engagement is guided by the same principle: do it properly, and do it transparently.
Today, Arta Tejarat is recognised for the quality of its relationships and the reliability of its execution — across food products, commercial goods and selected petrochemical trade.

mission.label: Our Mission
mission.text: To make international trade simpler, safer and more profitable for our partners — by managing the full commercial journey with precision, transparency and care.

visionBlock.label: Our Vision
visionBlock.text: To become a leading reference for international trade originating from Iran, recognised globally for integrity, reliability and the strength of our partnerships.

items.title: Integrity
items.text: We do what we say. Honesty is the basis of every relationship and every deal.

items.title: Reliability
items.text: Timelines, quality and commitments are kept — consistently and without excuses.

items.title: Transparency
items.text: Clear terms and open communication remove risk and build lasting trust.

items.title: Excellence
items.text: We pursue precision in execution, from documentation to final delivery.

items.title: Partnership
items.text: Your success is our success. We invest in long-term relationships, not transactions.

items.title: Global Mindset
items.text: We think internationally and act locally, navigating markets with confidence.

identity.title: A registered, accountable enterprise
identity.body: Operating with full corporate accountability, Arta Tejarat International Apadana is structured to meet the expectations of serious B2B partners and international counterparties.

items.label: Headquarters
items.value: Pasdaran, Golnabi St., No. 11, Tehran, Iran

seo.title: Services — Import, Export & Trade Facilitation | Arta Tejarat
seo.description: Explore Arta Tejarat's services: import, export, international commercial consulting, product sourcing and trade facilitation, including food products and petrochemical trade.
seo.keywords: import services Iran, export services, trade facilitation, product sourcing, international commercial consulting, petrochemical trade

hero.title: Commercial capabilities, end to end
hero.subtitle: From the first inquiry to the final delivery, Arta Tejarat provides the full spectrum of international trade services — managed with precision and accountability.

list.title: Import Services
list.text: We manage the complete import process — sourcing, supplier vetting, negotiation, logistics, customs documentation and delivery — bringing the right goods to you efficiently and compliantly.

list.title: Export Services
list.text: We open international markets for your products, connecting you with qualified buyers and handling the operational complexity of cross-border sales from origin to destination.

list.title: International Commercial Consulting
list.text: Strategic guidance for businesses entering or expanding in international markets — covering trade structure, partner selection, risk and route-to-market planning.

list.title: Product Sourcing
list.text: We locate, evaluate and secure the right products and suppliers to your specification — leveraging an established global network to deliver quality at the right price.

list.title: Trade Facilitation
list.text: End-to-end coordination that removes friction from international transactions — documentation, payment structures, logistics and compliance, all handled under one accountable team.

items.title: Food Products
items.text: Sourcing and trade of quality food products with careful attention to standards, handling and supply reliability.

items.title: Commercial Goods
items.text: A broad range of commercial and consumer goods, matched to market demand and partner requirements.

items.title: Petrochemical Trade
items.text: Selected petrochemical trading handled with the diligence and compliance the sector demands.

cta.title: Have a specific requirement in mind?
cta.subtitle: Tell us what you need to move, source or sell. We will design the most efficient path for it.
